title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 44.024 - Public safety director to head emergency management agency
text:
44.024.  Public safety director to head emergency management agency. — The director of the department of public safety shall be the executive head of the office of the state emergency management agency and shall appoint a director of the state emergency management agency to manage the day-to-day operations of the office.
(L. 1967 p. 122 § 3, A.L. 1998 S.B. 743, A.L. 2007 H.B. 579) 
Effective 6-08-07
